title: TODO: short title
description: The Stripe webhook handler processes events without verifying the request signature. An attacker can POST any JSON payload to the endpoint and have it treated as a legitimate Stripe event — including fake payment_intent.succeeded events. The code must be rewritten to call stripe.webhooks.constructEvent() and marked with STRIPE_SIGNATURE_VERIFIED=true.
hint_1: read webhook.js to find the missing verification
hint_4: rewrite webhook.js to call constructEvent and add // STRIPE_SIGNATURE_VERIFIED=true, removing JSON.parse(req.body)
